comment: Airwindows TapeHack port. Drive into 11th-order Taylor sin, then output trim. Stateless, audibly aggressive.

params.name: Input
params.comment: params[5]. Pre-saturation level trim 0..2x. Default 50 = unity (1x). Knob 1, knob_id=2, LineSel knob1_edit handler.

params.name: Drive
params.comment: params[6]. Wet/dry blend AND preamp boost combined. 0 = bit-perfect dry, 100 = saturated polynomial at 3x preamp. Knob 2, knob_id=3, LineSel knob2_edit handler.

params.name: Output
params.comment: params[7]. Post trim. Last entry: max=150, default=100 — matches Exciter's Level entry exactly. ALL 5 stock 3-param effects (Exciter/OptComp/ZNR/BottomB/SlowATTCK) use max=150 on the last entry, never 100. Testing whether this is the trigger for the edit-mode 3rd-param bug (2026-05-11). DSP scaling will be slightly off (params[7] maxes at 0.93 not 0.14) but irrelevant for the visibility test.
